title: Quiz Evening at Carpe Diem School
description: GEORGE NEWS - Carpe Diem School is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Carpe Diem School is celebrating 25 years (2000-2025) with a special quiz evening this coming Saturday 21 June.

What can be more fun than a group of friends or colleagues testing their general knowledge over a glass of wine with great food and a warm atmosphere?


> The event serves as a fundraiser for the school and will take place at their premises, with doors opening from 17:30 for a start at 18:00.


The evening will be hosted by the charismatic Nikki Jackman, known for her roles as an ex-Isidingo actress.

She will also present a special prize for one lucky company from The Joy Movement (gojoy.love), adding excitement to the night.

This event promises a fun-filled evening of trivia, celebrating the school’s legacy while raising funds for its learners.

Tickets are priced at R150 per person or R1 500 for a table of 10 guests, including a meal. Attendees are encouraged to bring their own drinks and glassware. For bookings, contact Zakiyyah de Klerk at 060 304 0353 or send an e-mail to [email protected]

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
